return(function(D,l,L,g,H,u,E,M,C,F,t,n,j,Z,k,x,y,o,W,B,e,d,I)Z,x,y,k,F,t,M,j,d,I,e,n,W,B,C,o=function(D,T)local l=x(T)local L=function(L,g,H,u,E,e)return k(D,{L,g,H;u,E;e},T,l)end return L end,function(D)for T=754523+-754522,#D,15859+-15858 do M[D[T]]=(475766+-475765)+M[D[T]]end if L then local k=L(true)local end,function(k,L,g,H)local xx,U,C,kx,Dx,v,m,Ex,Cx,Wx,gx,lx,h,R,Tx,Mx,s,Q,P,J,p,X,Ix,Y,x,N,nx,ox,Fx,yx,O,S,Bx,Zx,c,a,tx,i,ux,E,dx,K,B,V,Lx,ex,Hx,z,A,M,b,f,jx,w,G,n,r,q while k do if k<7166628-(-672013)then if k<2515669-(-980882)then if k<-880946+2180857 then if k<1200994-756728 then if k<-653714-(-795331)then if k<349451-256629 then if k<-190913+272372 then if end,{},function(D,T)local l=x(T)local L=function(...)return k(D,{...},T,l)end return L end,function()C=(230928-230927)+C M[C]=833597+-833596 return C end,function(D)local
